## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and CloudCulate to discuss potential marketing support and services.](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CloudCulate (founded Dec 2024) needs comprehensive marketing strategy/execution support for US expansion](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [GrowthX's core offering (content strategy/creation) doesn't fully align with CloudCulate's current needs](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [CloudCulate to pursue broader marketing strategy/infrastructure setup before reconsidering GrowthX in \~3-4 months](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds

  - [GrowthX: AI-driven content creation, recently raised Series A, 70 employees](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [CloudCulate: Founded Dec 2024, $1M+ revenue (Israel), expanding to US](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [CloudCulate targets medium/large enterprises, $400k-$1M contracts over 3-4 years](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

### CloudCulate's Marketing Needs

  - [Comprehensive marketing strategy and execution for US market entry](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Building brand presence (website, LinkedIn, etc.) from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Developing full-funnel approach to generate and nurture leads](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Current focus on outbound due to lack of inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### GrowthX Services

  - [Core focus: Organic content strategy and creation (editorial, programmatic)](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Strategy sprint: 6-8 weeks, $20k, deep dive into personas, competition, content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Execution phase: 12-month engagements, $12k-$15k/month for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Custom engagements possible but increase costs significantly](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [No paid advertising services offered](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)

### Misalignment of Needs vs. Offerings

  - [CloudCulate requires broader marketing strategy and infrastructure setup](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
  - [GrowthX's content-focused approach doesn't fully address CloudCulate's immediate needs](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [GrowthX typically works with companies that have existing marketing foundations](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to share meeting recording and GrowthX overview deck](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [Reconnect in 3-4 months after CloudCulate establishes initial marketing strategy/infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Guy to pursue broader marketing strategy support in the interim](https://fathom.video/share/srX5_mU3g_1zivC6LMfgjPJXsLpMsG7s?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
